sql: SELECT 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS pct_male_clients FROM client AS c JOIN district AS d ON c.district_id = d.district_id WHERE d.A3 = 'south Bohemia' AND CAST(d.A4 AS INTEGER) = (SELECT MAX(CAST(A4 AS INTEGER)) FROM district WHERE A3 = 'south Bohemia');
